reviews.review_description:
SECOND UPDATE: I reached out twice to devs through the email provided in their response and never heard back. Weak.

UPDATE: responsive devs merit a star bump in my book. Thanks for reaching out! 

Pretty cool 3rd person stealth game in theory, but becomes really frustrating when you get to a level that is seemingly impossible. Die a thousand times, then search for a discord that doesn't seem to exist, and finally scour YT for any walkthrough videos that may be available, only to find none.

developer_response.body:
We’re truly sorry for your experience 🙏. We’re checking what happened with the email, as our goal is always to provide support and respond to all players. We’ll be reaching out to you as soon as possible. If you’d like, you can also write us again at fun@monoku.com
. Thank you for your patience — we’re committed to improving!

reviews.review_description:
Great game that has improved a lot since the update. The presentation is much more professional and appealing. I would describe it as a third-person stealth game. The gameplay is fun and is played in mixed reality. It looks really good on the Quest 3.

There are still a few bugs that don't interfere with the gameplay (e.g., a crash after completing a level and receiving an achievement). I would also like to move directly to the next level after completing one, without having to go back to the level selection screen. I like it!
